id: oct24-3
name: Contrarian Wrong Approach Better
technique: contrarian
platforms: [linkedin]
tags: [contrarian, mobile-optimized, myth-busting, listicle, reframe]
source_month: "2024-10"
---

## Why It Works

This works because it's extremely mobile-optimized (short sentences meant to be read on mobile) and dispels a myth — that speed is GOOD. In fact, it's deeply contrarian which makes people take notice.

## Template

[Counterintuitive statement about your industry]
People focus too much on:
- [Wrong approach 1]
- [Wrong approach 2]
- [Wrong approach 3]
But successful people:
- [Better approach 1]
- [Better approach 2]
- [Better approach 3]
[Field] is about:
- Building [asset 1]
- Building [asset 2]
- Building [asset 3]
Remember: [Key advice].
The foundation is [core element].

## Example

Here's an example using the template, written from the perspective of an SEO.

Quality content is the new keyword stuffing.
People focus too much on:
- Cramming keywords everywhere
- Buying cheap backlinks
- Churning out thin content
But successful SEOs:
- Create valuable, user-focused content
- Build genuine relationships for natural links
- Optimize for user intent, not just search engines
SEO is about:
- Building authority
- Building user trust
- Building a great user experience
Remember: Focus on long-term strategies, not quick wins.
The foundation is relevance to your audience.
